title: Wedding Budget Calculator
summary: Small wedding budget calculator with exportable result and a paid workbook bridge for teams that want to speed up planning.
task_aliases: how much does a wedding cost
selection_rule: Use this module when the user wants to estimate wedding costs quickly with editable line items and a shareable worksheet output.

entries.title: Wedding Budget Calculator
entries.first_action: Open the calculator, enter total budget and category spend, then copy or download the worksheet output.
entries.smoke_test: Fill all fields and verify remaining budget, spend %, and per-guest average update; then download CSV and confirm a file is created.
entries.proof_signal: One page offers no-login estimate math, export intent events, and a checkout bridge for the paid workbook.
entries.fallback: Use official planning references such as Zola, The Knot, and NerdWallet to align assumptions before finalizing vendor orders.

fallback: If this module does not match the task, route to a source-first search or a different collection entry from collections/index.json.
